root_cause_decision: Bid on non-refrigerated slot at round 3
causal_chain: container_047 evaluated slot without temp constraint
cold chain violation detected at t+16
counterfactual: If container_047 had received temperature_constraint=4°C, it would have bid on crane_2_t14 — no violation
suggested_fix: Add null-check in ConstraintParser.parse() — raise ValueError if temperature_constraint is None for cold-chain cargo
